name_en: 💖Includes full original green box packaging💖[New] GG Marmont quilted mini bag. This GG Marmont mini bag features a high-recognizability silhouette, neutral burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, structured body, flap closure, and double G hardware. The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.

The bag offers versatile carrying options; the sliding metal chain allows easy switching between shoulder bag and handbag styles. Burgundy quilted V-shaped leather, antique gold hardware, suede microfiber lining with double G, sliding chain strap can be used as a shoulder strap (55cm length) or top handle (30cm length). Also works as a crossbody bag. Spring snap flap, weight: approx. 0.6kg.
Model: 446744.
Dimensions: 22(W) x 13(H) x 6cm(D)
Color: Burgundy/original leather.
Made in Italy
Model height: 177cm
Max capacity: iPhone Pro Max/Plus, AirPods, small wallet, and lipstick
